subcodes.first_line: We departed from the House, turning towards another land, calling to mind Our former days and giving voice to the verses of God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: غادرنا البیت مقبلا الی ارض اخری متذکرا ایامی الاولی و ناطقا بایات الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @banishment to; life in Constantinople
